title: Cisco security advisory (AV26-491)
description: On May 20, 2026, Cisco published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in multiple products. Included was a critical update for the following:
products: Cisco Secure Workload  version 3.9 and prior
Cisco Secure Workload  versions prior to 3.10.8.3
Cisco Secure Workload  versions prior to 4.0.3.17
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
